commands.repair_reason: - [P1] A repair worker can attempt the narrow mechanical fix by preserving protected mount precedence, reusing the shared bind parser, and aligning shell/browser/fs-path tests.; Needs attention: The diff changes sandbox mount precedence in a way that can weaken the read-only skill-source boundary for dangerous reserved-target binds.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve protected skill mounts over conflicting binds — src/a... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bind-target parsing and skips read-only workspace skill mounts in Docker and browser sandboxes when user binds claim the same container paths.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +73. Total +108 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source with medium confidence: current main appends custom binds before protected read-only skill mounts, and the linked issue reports Docker rejecting duplicate targets. I did not run a live Docker daemon.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A repair worker can attempt the narrow mechanical fix by preserving protected mount precedence, reusing the shared bind parser, and aligning shell/browser/fs-path tests.
